{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Grand Elder
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]]
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Grand Elder]] of the [[Heaven's Glory]] School is a powerful [[Jade]] and serves a role similar to a Patriarch or Matriarch of a clan.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16">''Unsouled'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Grand Elder]] of the [[Heaven's Glory]] School is a mountain of a man with huge muscles.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
